title: (40$) 1 YEAR Perplexity.AI PRO - PROMO
author: Verza-
selftext:
For a limited time only, you can get 80% off Perplexity AI 1-Year Pro Plan Voucher at Cheapgpt Store! Regularly it’s priced at $199.99, but right now you can get it for just $39.99!

To Order: https://CheapGPT.store

To score this deal, add the product to your cart, pay, and upon purchase check your email address for a key/voucher to upgrade your account to the pro plan.

Especially a chance for the people who didn't grab 1 Year Deal offer From Linkidin & Perplexity collab!

Get your plan now!
